arts.ttl: Leeds United could unleash 'most important' asset early with hoodoo on the line
arts.sum: Daniel Farke's team hosts a Paul Warne side with only one win from their last nine matches and their last two games were 2-1 home defeats. Max Wober will be the favourite because of the training and minutes he has had over the last few weeks, while Isaac Schmidt has had injuries, surgery and no match time since November 9.

arts.ttl: How Leeds United criticism is affecting Daniel Farke behind the scenes
arts.sum: Criticism or pressure is not getting through to Daniel Farke, who always expected there would be extreme opinions on his management at Leeds United. He knew it came with the territory and pointed back to Marcelo Bielsa’s era, when he was criticised, despite taking the club from the middle of the Championship to the top half of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Spotted: Major Leeds United boost pre-Derby hinted following recent Farke team news
arts.sum: Junior Firpo appears to have shaken off minor injury concerns from this week to be available as Leeds United host Derby County. Daniel Farke’s pre-match press conference this week brought mixed news – whilst Ethan Ampadu’s imminent return is a huge boost, left-back appears to be a concern this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Former Derby County midfielder entertains rumours after outstanding start to management
arts.sum: Despite having an impressive resume from his playing days, appearing for clubs such as Derby, Leicester City and Birmingham City, Savage is under no illusion that it means he should be managing at that level so early on in his coaching career. Speaking to Planet Sport Bet, Savage responded to the rumours: "I want to manage at the highest level I can, and if that's with Macclesfield, then great.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke wowed by Leeds United man in training, could sway selection process today
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford was brought off the bench ahead of Mateo Joseph last weekend at Blackburn Rovers, and it’s down to how the number nine has fared in training. Daniel Farke answers why Patrick Bamford came on ahead of Mateo Joseph

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Derby County as trio miss out amid big selection debate
arts.sum: "Paul is experienced enough - it's Leeds United and it's always like such an emotional club. Three points for the Whites over Derby County would lift Daniel Farke's side back above promotion rivals Sheffield United, who are not in action until tomorrow when they visit West Bromwich Albion.

arts.ttl: Leeds United Championship promotion race handed fresh twist as rivals drop more points
arts.sum: Leeds United have been handed a possible boost in their Championship promotion hopes with Burnley dropping points on Friday night. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Derby County on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Leeds United kick off their December fixture programme at home to mid-table Derby County. If you join our WhatsApp community, we will send links to the blog and post-match analysis straight to your phone.

arts.ttl: View: Leicester set to terminate Edouard loan, Leeds should pounce
arts.sum: It looks fairly clear that Leeds United could do with a new striker in the January window to add more firepower to the side as the debate swirls on between Joel Piroe or Mateo Joseph starting. It leaves Leeds with a debate heading towards January, around whether a new striker signing would be beneficial akin to how Ipswich Town rejuvenated their attack with Kieffer Moore and Ali Al-Hamadi last season – scoring 11 goals between them in the second half of the season.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Leeds United vs. Derby County
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. Derby County.
